title: The Hunter Cuts the Wire
storyPurpose: Nira Quill disables Meridian override; Guardian unstable; Spark hears pain.

panels.description: Nira Quill (uncertain hunter) appears from rooftop shadow; smashes Meridian override relay with a dampener spike.

bubbles.text: I won't collect a scream and call it order.
bubbles.speaker: Nira Quill

panels.description: Guardian staggers; override glyphs die; core spasms; Spark presses paws to ground, feeling pain-resonance.

bubbles.text: I won't order you. If you go — you choose.
bubbles.speaker: Mira Eggwarden

dialogue.text: I won't collect a scream and call it order.
dialogue.speaker: Nira Quill

dialogue.text: I won't order you. If you go — you choose.
dialogue.speaker: Mira Eggwarden

grokPrompt: Original high-energy Western fantasy comic storytelling with dynamic panel composition, dramatic inked linework, richly painted colors, expressive character acting, and clear cinematic action. Original Riftwilds IP only. Warm earth greens, sandstone, timber, moss first; pale stone, teal crystal, gold inlay, cyan rift energy and amber hearth as accents only. NO purple AI-fantasy default. NO Marvel/DC/Pokémon characters or logos. Riftwilds comic "The Lost City" Issue #4, STORY PAGE 20/25 — The Hunter Cuts the Wire. Story purpose: Nira Quill disables Meridian override; Guardian unstable; Spark hears pain. Layout: two-col. 2 panels with clear inked gutters. Panel 1 (p20a): Nira Quill (uncertain hunter) appears from rooftop shadow; smashes Meridian override relay with a dampener spike. Panel 2 (p20b): Guardian staggers; override glyphs die; core spasms; Spark presses paws to ground, feeling pain-resonance. Characters: nira-quill, mira-eggwarden, seris-vale. Creatures: spark. Spark design lock: Spark the Glowpup-line Riftborn hatchling: soft luminous fur, cyan-gold rift markings, large expressive eyes, small crystal growths, glowing-tip emotional tail, steadier aura when bonded; cute but original — not a franchise mascot. Keeper lock: Mira Eggwarden: young adult Hatchery mentor/Keeper, warm brown skin, dark hair in practical braid, travel-stained hatchery coat over Compact robes, Compact lantern charm on satchel, determined protective eyes. Environment: Aureth Vale Lost City. Time: day. Weather: clear over ruins. Lighting: pale stone with teal crystal glow. Continuity: {"nira": "disabled override", "guardian": "unstable", "sparkChoice": "pending"} Leave empty balloon-safe and narration-safe negative space in upper/lower panel corners. NO readable text of any kind in the artwork.
negativePrompt: readable dialogue text, captions, logos, watermarks, page numbers, UI chrome, Marvel, DC, Pokémon, manga screentone trademarks, extra limbs, duplicate characters, missing companions, purple neon fantasy default, photoreal modern clothing, Pikachu lookalike, Cal Reed
letteringInstructions: Standard speech + narration; keep tails off faces and Spark's eyes; Guardian speech may be formal/fragmented.
artAlt: The Hunter Cuts the Wire — The Lost City page 20
transcript: SPEECH (Nira Quill): I won't collect a scream and call it order.
WHISPER (Mira Eggwarden): I won't order you. If you go — you choose.
